_doc: === WORKSHOP REPORT: Three-tier critique of a narrative or narrative slice ===
_narrative_id: REQUIRED. Rewritten on import to match the imported narrative slug.
_tier: REQUIRED. One of: Junior | Mid | Senior. Drives critique depth and LLM cost (Junior: cheap surface review; Senior: structural / thematic / craft).

request._doc: Original WorkshopRequest that produced this report. Includes scope (full narrative vs. arc / scene / sequence) and focus areas.

findings.headline: Scene 3 lingers — consider trimming the descriptive interlude.
findings.detail: The 350-word block between the phone call and Volkov's exit slows momentum without setup payoff.

_findings: REQUIRED. Array of WorkshopFinding objects with category / severity / headline / detail / optional situation_ref.
summary: Strong opening, mid-act sag in scene 3, satisfying climax. Three actionable fixes proposed.
_model: OPTIONAL. Model identifier the report was produced with.
_cost_ledger_entry_id: OPTIONAL. Reference to a CostLedgerEntry in cl/ for spend tracking.
